result.stdout:
pub
  Command use for publish an dacpac on database server

Usage:
  Dacpac.Tool [options] pub [command]

Options:
  dacpath, -d <d> (REQUIRED)      Dacpac file directory
  NamePattern, -f <f> (REQUIRED)  Name of the file to use. Accept search patterns
  -?, -h, --help                  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  db
  server

Usage:

Options:
  connectionString, -c <c> (REQUIRED)                    Connection string that must be used to access the database
  AllowDropBlockingAssemblies

  AllowExternalLibraryPaths

  IgnoreTablePartitionOptions

  IgnoreWithNocheckOnForeignKeys
  IgnoreWorkloadClassifiers

  IsAlwaysEncryptedParameterizationEnabled
